## Handoff

Fill the fields below using canonical role IDs.

next_owner: <choose one: product_manager | project_manager | technical_architect | software_engineer | qa_analyst>
next_required_action: <clear next step>
status: <ready for next stage | blocked | completed>

Note: Self-handoff is only allowed when status is completed or blocked.
